job_title: Sr. Software Engineer (Proficiency in NestJS & React Required)
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
core_skills: NestJS, React, Web Services, API, Microservices
skill_match_scores: NestJS:0.0, React:1.0, Web Services:1.0, API:1.0, Microservices:1.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years of concentrated, daily experience with NestJS is required, 3+ years of concentrated, daily experience with React is required, Web Services/API experience (.Net Core), Experience with Microservices (.Net Core), Knowledge of Azure CI/CD pipelines, Strong database skills (MS SQL), Experience with JQuery and legacy Webforms (.Net 4.8), Familiarity with AI tooling for DevEx, Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience), 3–5+ years of experience in full stack development (or equivalent experience demonstrating strong skills in the required technologies)
core_responsibilities: Be an essential contributor to the engineering team and team culture, Take full ownership of major features from inception to production, Lead initiatives independently while leveraging support from the team, Analyze, troubleshoot, and fix bugs efficiently, Collaborate across departments to ensure the product meets user needs
job_summary: Fullsteam is a leading provider of vertical software and embedded payments technology dedicated to helping businesses flourish by providing their customers with seamless experiences. We are seeking a confident Sr. Software Engineer to join our engineering team as a core member, where you will take ownership of major features, contribute to product strategy, and help shape the engineering culture.
